goal: Add a side-effect-free audit preflight builder that validates memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt record artifacts are ready for later audit authorization while keeping audit writes, durable writes, file writes, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and external actions closed.
scope_out: Do not write audits, perform durable receipt writes, consume permits, write export files, persist durable state, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or perform external actions.
claims: Recorded memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt artifacts can be preflighted for later audit authorization without writing an audit.
Audit ref, auditor ref, and audit policy ref are required.
Audit writes, file writes, external actions, and durable persistence remain false.
assumptions: Audit authorization, durable audit persistence, and export writing require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing audit ref, and incomplete record cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Audit write, durable receipt write, permit consumption, file write, durable persistence, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-156 produced an in-memory memory-cache audit export consume execution receipt record without durable persistence.
